Newsletter

Newsletter Archive

Weekly notes on AI and product marketing — every Friday

The Future of PMM Weekly Note — A resource that looks at how AI will impact our jobs as product marketers. Tools, skillsets, best practices, and real-world examples delivered to your inbox every Friday.

  • April 3, 2026

    Issue #8: The Data Layer Gets Real

    SAP acquires Reltio to make enterprise data "AI-ready." Why the golden record is the new competitive moat. Plus: a new assessment to benchmark where you stand in the AI transformation, and the week's biggest moves in agentic AI.

    SAP + Reltio Where Do You Sit?
  • March 27, 2026

    Issue #7: The New Middlemen

    Three platforms, same week, same move: inserting an AI layer between your product and your buyer. Why the real story isn't ads — it's the full-stack connection from ERP to AI checkout. Plus: the $50B OpenAI-Amazon bet, agentic commerce data, and the week's biggest moves.

    Agentic Commerce Full Stack Analysis
  • March 20, 2026

    Issue #6: The 10x PMM

    What separates PMM teams using AI from teams transformed by it? Take the 10x PMM Scorecard. Plus: Will Scott on prompts as workflows, Austin Lau's solo marketing operation at Anthropic, and major moves from Salesforce, Workday, and Oracle.

    10x Scorecard Learning of the Week
  • March 14, 2026

    Issue #5: Content for Two Audiences

    42% of B2B buyers now start research in AI search tools. Your content strategy just doubled in complexity — here's how to write for humans AND machines. Plus: an explainer on MCP, the protocol reshaping how AI finds your product.

    GEO Strategy MCP Explainer
  • March 7, 2026

    Issue #4: The Pattern Emerges

    After 35 daily editions and 180+ articles, the pattern is clear: buyers are becoming agents, thought leadership is dead, and only 6% of marketers are AI-ready. Plus: Evertune (Vendor of the Week) and Skyler Neal's Agent of Curiosity.

    Analysis Vendor of the Week
  • February 28, 2026

    Issue #3: The Agentic Shift

    Your buyer just hired an agent — now what? We explore the K-shaped future of PMM, spotlight Soo Shim's BattleCoach prototype, and introduce the Agentic PMM Hype Cycle.

    Agentic PMM User of the Week
  • February 17, 2026

    Issue #2: AI Tools Deep Dive

    We test 3 AI content tools on the same brief, build competitive battlecards, and meet Olivier who built his own RAG system. Plus: survey results preview and news roundup.

    Tools Test User of the Week
  • February 14, 2026

    Issue #1: AI Tools for Product Marketing

    What's coming and how it will help you work smarter. A practical guide to the AI tools we're evaluating, plus Matt Shumer's viral essay, the Gartner PMM Skills Assessment, and more.

    Featured Guide Chart of the Week
